---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
What problem does this solve? What workflow is currently painful?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature and how it should work.

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you considered and why you didn't choose them.

## Additional Context
Examples, references, or mockups that illustrate the idea.
